description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named libBLS Nightly Tests that runs daily at midnight. The workflow consists of two jobs: main_job and linux_build_with_emscripten. main_job runs on ubuntu-18.04, sets up Python 3.6, installs dependencies, builds and tests libBLS with valgrind. linux_build_with_emscripten also runs on ubuntu-18.04, installs dependencies, sets up Node.js, builds libBLS with emscripten, and runs tests.
